ExampleLanternBond.title: ExampleLanternBond
ExampleLanternBond.Name: [color=#60b0ff]Lantern Bond[/color]
ExampleLanternBond.Description:
On [color=#78bca4]using[/color] [color=#60b0ff]Lantern Vigil[/color]:

     apply [color=#60b0ff]Ashen Ward[/color] to yourself
     summon a [color=#60d0ff]Lantern Wisp[/color]
     deal [color=#8030af]Astral damage[/color] to the closest enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]Ward duration = 4 * skill level
Damage = 10 * skill level[/color]

ExampleLanternSaint.title: ExampleLanternSaint
ExampleLanternSaint.name: [color=#60b0ff]Lantern Saint[/color]
ExampleLanternSaint.brief: Example custom god using a modded invoke, buff, and summon
ExampleLanternSaint.description_start: Prayer kindles a [color=#60b0ff]ward[/color], calls a [color=#60d0ff]wisp[/color], and lashes the nearest foe with [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] fire.
ExampleLanternSaint.prayer: O Lantern Saint, keep the ash-lamp lit.
ExampleLanternSaint.description: An example god entry wired to a custom invoke that applies a custom buff and summons a custom ally.

ExampleLanternVigil.title: ExampleLanternVigil
ExampleLanternVigil.name: [color=#60b0ff]Lantern Vigil[/color]
ExampleLanternVigil.description:
Apply [color=#60b0ff]Ashen Ward[/color] to yourself

Summon a [color=#60d0ff]Lantern Wisp[/color]

Deal [color=#8030af]10 Astral damage[/color] to the closest enemy

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area
ExampleLanternVigil.description_short: Apply [color=#60b0ff]Ashen Ward[/color], summon a [color=#60d0ff]Lantern Wisp[/color], and deal [color=#8030af]10 Astral damage[/color] to the closest enemy

ExampleAshenWard.title: ExampleAshenWard
ExampleAshenWard.name: Ashen Ward
ExampleAshenWard.description: A pale ring of ash-light circles the bearer.

ExampleLanternWisp.title: ExampleLanternWisp
ExampleLanternWisp.name: Lantern Wisp
ExampleLanternWisp.description: A lamp-spirit drawn from the saint's ash-blue prayer.

ExampleLanternBond.title: ExampleLanternBond
ExampleLanternBond.text: The Lantern Saint's keepers carry ash in bronze censers and call little lights from it with a single low prayer. This example pack shows a custom invoke, buff, and summoned ally working together.
